option.name: originalContent
option.value:
[build-system] requires = ["setuptools>=61.0", "wheel"] build-backend = "setuptools.build_meta"
[project] name = "email_triage_env" version = "1.0.0" description = "Customer support email triage environment for OpenEnv" authors = [{ name = "Hackathon Participant", email = "participant@example.com" }] #readme = "README.md" requires-python = ">=3.9" dependencies = [ "pydantic>=2.5.0", "fastapi>=0.104.0", "uvicorn[standard]>=0.24.0", "openai>=1.6.0", "openenv-core>=0.1.0", "requests>=2.31.0", "python-dotenv>=1.0.0", ]
[project.scripts] server = "server.app:main" # ← MUST be exactly "server"
[project.entry-points."openenv.environments"] email_triage = "email_triage_env:EmailTriageEnv"
[tool.uv] dev-dependencies = []
[tool.setuptools.packages.find] include = ["email_triage_env*", "server*"]

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
[build-system] requires = ["setuptools>=61.0", "wheel"] build-backend = "setuptools.build_meta"
[project] name = "email_triage_env" version = "1.0.0" description = "Customer support email triage environment for OpenEnv" authors = [{ name = "Hackathon Participant", email = "participant@example.com" }] #readme = "README.md" requires-python = ">=3.9" dependencies = [ "pydantic>=2.5.0", "fastapi>=0.104.0", "uvicorn[standard]>=0.24.0", "openenv-core>=0.1.0", "requests>=2.31.0", "python-dotenv>=1.0.0", ]
[project.scripts] server = "server.app:main" # ← MUST be exactly "server"
[project.entry-points."openenv.environments"] email_triage = "email_triage_env:EmailTriageEnv"
[tool.uv] dev-dependencies = []
[tool.setuptools.packages.find] include = ["email_triage_env*", "server*"]
